_comment: Global Claude Code settings. Lives at ~/.claude/settings.json. Keep this lean. Per-machine overrides go in ~/.claude/settings.local.json (gitignored).

permissions._comment_mode: Options: 'default' (ask every time), 'acceptEdits' (auto-allow file edits), 'plan' (read-only), 'bypassPermissions' (auto-allow everything — convenient but risky outside a trusted environment)

_comment_voice: Remove this block if you don't use the voice feature.
_comment_plugins: Enable Anthropic-published plugins by name. See https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/claude-code/plugins for the current list.
